posts.author: goldfish (Shir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking for ideas on the following:
We have one board that holder requirements from all our customers.
The board has a dropdown list of customer names (multi-select)
We have a board for each customer with items specific for that customer

Looking for a way to show a subset of requirements relevant for customer X in the customer X board (based on the customer name in the main requirements board)

Any help is appreciated…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @goldfish,

Would the connect boards column help in this instance? This way you can connect the relevant items from customer X, in customer X board?

You could also set up a match automation to connect the items (from across boards) based on a matched column value - i.e. customer name?

Screen Shot 2022-12-12 at 2.40.33 pm1436×1176 93.7 KB
